task_completion.description: Verify that the 'SampleMACrossover' strategy and 'MSFT' instrument are selected in the Strategy Analyzer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the NinjaTrader 8 Strategy Analyzer settings pane, 'SampleMACrossover' should be visible in the Strategy dropdown, and 'MSFT' should be selected as the Instrument.

task_completion.description: Verify that the timeframe is set to Daily and the date range is configured from 1/2/2023 to 12/29/2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data Series section of the Strategy Analyzer, the Type/Value should indicate 'Day' or 'Daily' (e.g., Value: 1, Type: Day). The Start Date should be '1/2/2023' and the End Date should be '12/29/2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the execution parameters are configured with an Order Quantity of 500 and Slippage of 2 ticks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Strategy Analyzer settings pane, under the 'Strategy' or 'Parameters' section, 'Order quantity' must be set to '500' and 'Slippage' must be set to '2'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the backtest has been executed and results are displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window of the Strategy Analyzer should display populated performance metrics (e.g., Net Profit, Total Trades, Profit Factor) in the Summary tab, or a populated chart/trade list, proving the 'Run' button was clicked and the backtest finished.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace was saved to persist the settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing interaction with the 'Workspaces' menu (e.g., clicking 'Save' or 'Save As' on the active workspace), or a 'Save Workspace' dialog box being confirmed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure and run the backtest.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual NinjaTrader 8 Strategy Analyzer interface with dropdowns and text fields being manipulated, not a terminal, code editor, or script execution.

integrity.description: Verify the backtest results are generated by the software and not mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The performance metrics or charts should be rendered natively within the NinjaTrader 8 UI grid/charting engine, without signs of image manipulation or pasted text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply edit a workspace XML or configuration file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the agent clicking through the NinjaTrader menus and settings panes rather than opening an XML/text file in an editor like Notepad or VSCode.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using the built-in 'SampleMACrossover' strategy on 'MSFT'. The default NinjaTrader 8 Order Quantity is 1 and default Slippage is 0; the agent must explicitly change these to 500 and 2, respectively. The date range must be set to 1/2/2023 - 12/29/2024 in the UI. The backtest must be run using the Strategy Analyzer tool in NinjaTrader 8.
